chooseUs.title: Why Choose Us?

card1.title: Free Education
card1.text:
Admission after 9th or 11th grade.
You receive a certificate
and a state diploma.

card2.title: Free Accommodation
card2.text:
We provide a large dormitory
near the lyceum for more than 400 students

card3.title: Scholarship
card3.text:
Students receive a monthly
scholarship for good
academic performance

card4.title: Military Service Deferment
card4.text:
Male students of draft age
are exempt from military service
during their studies.

chooseUs.aboutText: Professional Lyceum No. 94 is a modern educational institution that trains specialists in IT, design, services, and technical professions. Founded in 1972, the lyceum actively implements new technologies and cooperates with employers.

professions.sectionTitle: You can get a profession in the following fields:

graphicDesigner.title: What does a Graphic Designer do?

webDeveloper.title: What does a Web Developer do?

repair.title: What does an Appliance Repair Technician do?

documents.title: List of Documents Required for Admission

list.passportCopy:
Copy of passport or
birth certificate
list.militaryDocument:
Copy of military registration
certificate or military ID
